nasb.text: Their border was from Heleph, from the oak in Zaanannim and Adami-nekeb and Jabneel, as far as Lakkum, and it ended at the Jordan.

esv.text: And their boundary ran from Heleph, from the oak in Zaanannim, and Adami-nekeb, and Jabneel, as far as Lakkum, and it ended at the Jordan.

cnv.text: 他們的疆界，是從希利弗，從撒拿音的橡樹林，從亞大米．尼吉和雅比聶起，去到拉共，直通到約旦河；

ccb.text: 他们的边界从希利弗、撒拿音的橡树、亚大米·尼吉和雅比聂到拉共，再到约旦河；
